request.prompt: Cinematic 9:16 vertical macro shot. Extreme close-up of a stand mixer's whisk attachment slowly turning through soft peaks of whipped cream, glossy ribbons folding in slow motion, the bowl glints under warm tungsten light. Shallow depth of field, locked camera, only the whisk-and-cream in focus, marble counter just barely visible at the bottom edge. Food-cinematography aesthetic, gentle film grain, no rapid motion, low speed.
